A French pole vaulter has gone viral after his Olympic dream ended when his crotch hit the bar at the Paris Games overnight.

Anthony Ammirati was on his third attempt to clear the 5.70m height, with eagle-eyed social media users spotting exactly which part of his body had knocked him out of contention.

Footage of the 22-year-old’s attempt quickly went viral on X (formerly Twitter) with more than nine million views.

“oh he brought that baguette to the games,” one user wrote.

“Well, you win some you lose some,” another said.

More comments on X included: “Suffering from success, “Loses vault. Wins internet” and “Stiff competition.”

While social media relentlessly mocked the Frenchman, Ammirati was devastated after having to settle for a 12th-placed finish after clearing 5.60 metres.

But Ammirati is not the first pole vaulter to be eliminated this way, after Japanese competitor Hiroki Ogita hit the bar with the same part of his body in the 2016 Rio de Janeiro Games.

The men’s pole vault final will take place at 1am on Tuesday morning (AWST), with Australian star Kurtis Marschall making it through after he cleared the dreaded 5.70m bar.
title: Olympic Games 2024: French pole vaulter Anthony Ammirati goes rival after buldge touches bar | PerthNow
description: A French pole vaulter has gone viral after his Olympic dream ended when his crotch hit the bar at the Paris Games overnight. WATCH THE VIRAL VIDEO
